title: Deployment web-frontend v3.4.1
text: Deployed web-frontend version 3.4.1 to production. Includes landing page load time improvements and GA4 event tag updates.

title: Deployment api-gateway v2.1.0
text: Deployed api-gateway version 2.1.0. Rate limiting middleware updated to support higher burst allowances.

title: Monitor alert: Disk usage high db-01
text: Monitor 2004 triggered: disk usage on db-01 exceeded 85% threshold at 87.3%. DBA notified.

title: Monitor recovered: Web frontend p95 latency
text: Monitor 2001 recovered: frontend latency returned to normal range following rollout of nginx tuning changes.

title: Autoscale event web-02
text: Autoscaler added one additional instance behind web-02 load balancer during Tuesday peak traffic window.

title: Deployment crm-sync v1.5.3
text: Deployed crm-sync v1.5.3. Fixed Salesforce OAuth token refresh edge case that caused intermittent sync failures.

title: Scheduled maintenance - db-01 disk cleanup
text: Completed scheduled disk cleanup on db-01. Freed 42GB of old log files and vacuum ran on stale tables. Disk usage down to 71%.

title: CDN invalidation - campaign landing pages
text: CloudFront cache invalidated for /lp/* path pattern following Q2 2026 campaign landing page updates.

title: A/B test launched: Homepage Hero Variant B
text: A/B test homepage-hero launched with 50/50 split. Variant B features new headline emphasizing ROI. Test ID: exp-2026-061.

title: Monitor alert: Log error volume spike
text: Monitor 2019 triggered: error log volume exceeded 200 in 5 minutes following deployment of v3.4.1. Rolled back to v3.4.0 as precaution.

title: Monitor recovered: Log error volume spike
text: Monitor 2019 recovered after rollback to v3.4.0 completed successfully. Error log volume returned to baseline.

title: Deployment email-sender v2.8.0
text: Deployed email-sender v2.8.0. Updated Klaviyo webhook handler and added delivery receipt logging for compliance.

title: Synthetic test failure - checkout flow
text: Synthetic monitor test:checkout-flow failed 2 consecutive runs due to payment provider timeout. Incident tracked under INC-2026-0412.

title: Synthetic test recovered - checkout flow
text: Synthetic monitor test:checkout-flow passing again. Payment provider timeout was resolved on their end. INC-2026-0412 closed.

title: Deployment web-frontend v3.4.2 (hotfix)
text: Hotfix deployment v3.4.2: corrected GA4 event naming inconsistency that was undercounting newsletter signup conversions.

title: Scheduled security scan completed
text: Monthly dependency vulnerability scan completed. No critical vulnerabilities found. Two medium severity items logged for next sprint.

title: Load test completed - Q4 prep
text: Load test simulating 3x normal traffic completed successfully. web-01 and web-02 held steady at peak load. No autoscaling triggered.

title: Deployment analytics-tracker v1.3.0
text: Deployed analytics-tracker v1.3.0 with updated GA4 custom dimensions mapping aligned to Q4 benchmarking requirements.

title: DB backup verified - weekly
text: Weekly database backup verification completed. Restore test successful. RPO confirmed at under 60 minutes.

title: Autoscale event web-01 scale-down
text: Autoscaler removed one instance from web-01 group after sustained off-peak traffic levels overnight.
